description_long: This object depicts two green parrots perched on a naturalistic, twisted branch. The birds have vibrant green plumage with subtle yellowish highlights and a few red markings visible on the wings and tail. Their beaks are pale and slightly hooked, typical of parrot species, and their eyes are small and dark. The branch is light brown with a weathered, textured appearance, adding to the lifelike quality of the scene. The birds are positioned close together, one slightly above the other, suggesting a social or interactive pose. The overall composition is compact and detailed, capturing the essence of these birds in a natural resting state.
description: Two green parrots with hooked beaks perch closely on a twisted, weathered branch, displaying lifelike detail and vibrant plumage.
description_view_0: A rear-side view showing both parrots from behind, highlighting their green backs and the curvature of the branch.
description_view_1: A side view with both parrots visible, one perched higher and the other lower, clearly showing their beaks and the length of their tails.
description_view_2: A top-down view emphasizing the rounded backs and wing feathers of the parrots, with both birds' heads slightly visible.
description_view_3: A side view from the opposite direction, showing the birds' profiles and the full extension of the branch.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid green with subtle yellowish highlights and small red patches on wings and tail
